supportingConnections.explanation: graph maintenance: reparented floating aim by semantic similarity

status.comment: Custom aim colors implemented end to end: color field on the Aim schema (4a05d4ff), color picker in AimEditModal, nodes rendered in their custom color (convertNodes: custom color overrides priority/status), and arrows rendered in the supporting aim's color (667df056). graphData carries aim.color -> GraphNode.customColor -> renderer. Frontend suite 132/132, both typechecks clean. Visual rendering verified by code inspection; in-browser smoke test still recommended.
